conversion_source: LEAP capital-cost convention: USD/(GJ/yr of capacity) stores the same numeric value as overnight USD per annual GJ produced.

conversion_source: Coconut nuts-in-shell LHV ≈ 13.5 GJ/t (FAO Coconut Statistical Compendium; shell + copra weighted).

conversion_source: Sugarcane (raw, wet, including bagasse mass) LHV ≈ 7.5 GJ/t (FAO Sugar Statistical Yearbook; bagasse 18 GJ/t × 30% mass + sugar 16 GJ/t × 12% mass + water).
